_note: Daemon detachment modifiers — game mechanics only. Engine loads this for DPP/SURV/MOB computation. Modeled as always-on unless noted. 9 detachments total (11e Faction Pack).

choices.name: Warp Rifts
choices.condition: Deep Strike >6" instead of >9" wholly within Shadow of Chaos or near matching-god Greater Daemon
choices.description: Improved Deep Strike range (avg +3" placement flexibility)

choices.name: Denizens of the Warp
choices.condition: stratagem: Deep Strike after normal move
choices.description: Mobile Deep Strike positioning

choices.name: First Prince of Chaos - Khorne
choices.condition: Khorne: Murderer's Cowl — Advance/charge/shoot
choices.description: Khorne units gain Lethal Hits

choices.name: First Prince of Chaos - Tzeentch
choices.condition: Tzeentch: Penumbral Puppetry — Stealth, -1 hit in melee
choices.description: Tzeentch units gain Stealth

choices.name: First Prince of Chaos - Nurgle
choices.condition: Nurgle: Gloam Rot — S > T = -1 to wound the unit
choices.description: Nurgle units have -1 to wound when S > T

choices.name: First Prince of Chaos - Slaanesh
choices.condition: Slaanesh: Shadow's Caress — cannot be snap shot
choices.description: Slaanesh units gain Sustained Hits 1

choices.name: Dark Pacts (Undivided)
choices.condition: Undivided: Dark Pacts — choose Lethal Hits or Sustained Hits 1 per activation
choices.description: Undivided units gain Lethal Hits (modeled as Lethal)

choices.name: Unholy Avalanche
choices.condition: MOUNTED units: Fall Back can still shoot/charge
choices.description: Mounted units full mobility — Advance and charge, Fall Back and shoot/charge

choices.name: Warp-Riders
choices.condition: MOUNTED units: +3" effective movement from stratagems
choices.description: Mounted units enhanced mobility

choices.name: Loci of Power
choices.condition: CHARACTER non-MONSTER: +1 LD, +1 OC
choices.description: Character units gain Stealth

choices.name: Swollen With Power
choices.condition: enhancement: +2 Wounds for CHARACTER
choices.description: Characters gain improved invuln

choices.name: Shudderblink
choices.condition: BATTLELINE: Advance with Assault weapons and still charge
choices.description: Battleline units Advance with Assault weapons and can charge

choices.name: Daemonic Infestation
choices.condition: stratagem: heal 3 wounds / return models
choices.description: Battleline sustain from stratagems

choices.name: Murdercall
choices.condition: Enemy ends move within 8" → D6" surge move
choices.description: Khorne units gain reactive D6" surge move (avg 3.5")

choices.name: Gore-Hungry Onslaught
choices.description: Khorne units gain Sustained Hits 1

choices.name: Wrath Undeniable
choices.condition: stratagem: fight on death
choices.description: Khorne units have FNP 5+ (fight on death effect)

choices.name: Fates in Flux
choices.condition: Spend Flux token to re-roll any roll for Tzeentch unit
choices.description: Tzeentch units can re-roll all hits (Flux tokens)

choices.name: Pyrogenesis
choices.condition: stratagem: +2S or +3S +1AP for Tzeentch unit
choices.description: Tzeentch ranged gains +1 AP

choices.name: Flickering Reality
choices.condition: stratagem: 'no hit on X' for Tzeentch unit
choices.description: Tzeentch units gain improved invuln vs shooting (3++)

choices.name: Melancholic Miasma
choices.condition: Enemy within 9" of Nurgle unit is in Shadow of Chaos
choices.description: Nurgle units extend Shadow of Chaos (Stealth-like debuff)

choices.name: Seeping Virulence
choices.condition: stratagem: critical hits on 5+
choices.description: Nurgle ranged attacks gain Sustained Hits 1

choices.name: Rot and Renewal
choices.condition: stratagem: return models / heal unit
choices.description: Nurgle units have FNP 5+

choices.name: Beguiling Aura
choices.condition: Slaanesh units can charge after Falling Back
choices.description: Slaanesh units: Fall Back and charge

choices.name: Seductive Gambit
choices.condition: After charge, trade Fights First for re-roll all hits and re-roll wounds of 1
choices.description: Slaanesh units: re-roll all hits and wounds of 1 after charge

choices.name: False Majesty
choices.condition: enhancement: +1 to wound in melee
choices.description: Slaanesh characters: +1 to wound in melee
